store_headline: WordPress Theme for Churches and Ministries
store_subheadline: Share sermons, manage service schedules, and accept donations from one church website.
features: Church and ministry-focused design with timeless aesthetics
Event management for services, Bible studies, and church activities
Sermon and message library with audio playlist integration
Portfolio showcase for ministries and community outreach programs
Bible verse of the day widget for spiritual engagement
Video gallery with custom thumbnails for sermon recordings
Elementor page builder with church-specific design elements
Dynamic content showcases with Slider Revolution
WooCommerce integration for bookstore and donation products
Contact forms for prayer requests and ministry inquiries
Mobile-optimized responsive design for congregation access
One-click demo import with complete church website setups
selling_points: The only WolfThemes theme built from the ground up for churches and ministries
Fraktur typography and cathedral photography signal traditional Catholic identity more clearly than any competitor
Integrated sermon library with audio and video support — no separate podcast or media plugin required
Event management built for mass schedules, Bible studies, and ministry activities organized for a church's actual calendar
WooCommerce integration supports an online bookstore, donation products, and ministry fundraising from one platform
Gold and burgundy palette with blackletter typography creates reverent visual authority — the digital equivalent of cathedral architecture
Elementor page builder gives ministry administrators full page control without technical knowledge or developer costs
key_benefits: Build a complete church website with sermons, schedules, and online giving
Share sermons as audio and video through a browsable dedicated library
Manage the full church calendar — masses, Bible studies, and community events
Attract congregation members with a reverent identity signaling traditional faith values
Accept donations and sell bookstore items through WooCommerce without redirecting your community
Give ministry staff full editorial control via Elementor — no developer required
Launch with blackletter typography and cathedral imagery unique in the WordPress market
design_features: Sermon library and message archive displays
Event calendar for services and church activities
Bible verse displays and devotional sections
Video sermon galleries with custom thumbnails
Multiple header styles with welcoming aesthetics

testimonials.text: Covenant has transformed how our church connects with our congregation. The sermon library with audio integration makes it easy for members to access messages they missed, and the events calendar keeps everyone informed about church activities. Our online engagement has grown tremendously.
testimonials.author: churchpastor

testimonials.text: As a ministry leader, I needed a website that could showcase our various outreach programs while maintaining a welcoming, spiritual atmosphere. Covenant's portfolio features and Bible verse integration have been perfect for our mission. The timeless design will serve us for years to come.
testimonials.author: ministrycoordinator

testimonials.text: Our congregation loves the new website built with Covenant. The prayer request forms have increased community connection, and being able to watch sermon videos online has been invaluable for our homebound members. It truly feels like an extension of our church family.
testimonials.author: churchadministrator
